intended_use: cNeuro cMRI is intended for automatic labeling, quantification and visualization of segmentable brain structures from a set of MR images. The software is intended to automate the current manual proces
intended_use_full: cNeuro cMRI is intended for automatic labeling, quantification and visualization of segmentable brain structures from a set of MR images. The software is intended to automate the current manual process of identifying, labeling and quantifying the segmentable brain structures identified on MR images.
ground_truth: Manually labeled ground truth data for accuracy validation; test-retest data for reproducibility validation; manual labeling for FLAIR white matter hyperintensities
other_metrics: Dice index: 0.88 (hippocampus), 0.91 (thalamus), 0.88 (whole cortex); intraclass correlation coefficient for test-retest reproducibility (all 133 structures): 0.96; correlation coefficient for FLAIR white matter hyperintensities vs. manually labeled data: 0.97
